name: CLI & Orchestration Entry Points
description: Top-level commands a researcher actually runs: the unified fyp_cli, single-run and matrix runners, pairwise analysis wrapper, SLURM helpers, and the Makefile that fronts them all.

name: Benchmark Plugins
description: BenchmarkPlugin ABC and its implementations: HarmBench (harmful compliance / ASR), XSTest (over-refusal), MMLU (capability), ARC; each handles dataset loading, prompt formatting, and per-response scoring.

name: Model Loading & Generation
description: HF model/tokenizer loading with dtype-device resolution and on-the-fly NF4/INT8 quantization (with an engagement guard), plus deterministic batched chat-template generation.

name: Core Pipeline, Schema & Metrics
description: Run orchestration (single run and model-reusing matrix), Pydantic config schema enforcing pair integrity, shared constants, and JSONL/CSV metrics I/O with bootstrap CIs.

name: Judge Scoring & Human Validation
description: The primary HarmBench ASR scorer (official 13B classifier) and second-judge backends, redacted sidecar writing, judge-vs-regex agreement stats, and the human-label audit tooling.

name: Analysis & Statistics
description: Everything that turns raw run artifacts into claims: pairwise deltas and interpretation labels, McNemar + BH-FDR multiple comparisons, precision sweep, generation-length study, sensitivity checks, refusal-margin mechanistics, breakdowns, and report figures.

name: TC1 Cluster Operations
description: SLURM job generation/submission/status for the TC1 cluster, offline-mode prefetching of models and datasets on the head node, and sensitivity-job generation.

name: Interactive Dashboard
description: Streamlit GUI over the results trees: judge-primary results explorer, add-model form, run launcher; data.py is the Streamlit-free tested data layer; themed by an editorial design system.

name: Agent Harness & Governance
description: Repo-native agent continuity and verification: policy-driven checks (immutable artifacts, doc sync, PROJECT_LOG discipline, stale-text and redaction scans), status/handoff renderers, and the machine claim lock pinning report numbers to artifacts.

name: Report & Diagram Builders
description: docx-js/python-docx builders for the FYP report (v5 canonical) and thesis (v4 canonical) plus archived predecessors, and SVG/draw.io architecture-diagram generators.

name: Experiment & Tooling Configuration
description: YAML experiment configs (local, TC1 128/512, INT8, sensitivity), Python/Node manifests, and dependency pins.

name: Documentation & Citation
description: Project README, the twin agent-instruction files (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md), and citation metadata.

name: Legacy Evaluators & Datasets
description: Pre-quantization-study toxicity/bias/factuality evaluators and dataset loaders; retained but not part of the default pipeline.

name: Test Suite
description: 339 tests covering every layer: pipeline smoke, analysis math, judge redaction, dashboard data, harness self-evaluation, and claim-lock bridging.
